_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement)

title: Item Unique Identification (IUID) Marking And Verification Report
summary: The Item Unique Identification (IUID) Marking and Verification Report provides data from IUID marking activities, including physical asset marking, registration, verification, inventory, and quality audits, with a Pass/Fail verification column.
use_relationship:
The Item Unique Identification (IUID) Marking and Verification Report is a tabular list which provides the data resulting from IUID marking activities such as: physical asset marking, registration, verification, inventory audits, quality audits, and other asset lifecycle activities. A key attribute for the report is the Verification column which indicates (Pass/Fail) for each IUID marked item that is verified.

This Data Item Description (DID) contains format and content preparation instructions for the data product generated by the specific and discrete task requirements delineated in the contract.

This DID is applicable in a contract which contains a requirement for marking parts and equipment with IUID data matrix labels.
distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: Reference documents.
preparation_instructions.content: The applicable issue of the documents cited herein, including their approval dates and the dates of applicable amendments, notices and revisions, shall be as cited in the contract.

preparation_instructions.title: Format.
preparation_instructions.content: The IUID Marking & Verification Report shall be in Contractor's format.

preparation_instructions.title: Content.
preparation_instructions.content: The IUID Marking & Verification Report shall be present as specified in MIL-STD-130 and shall also contain:
